features: PROTECT YOUR ELECTRICAL APPLIANCES FROM POWER SURGES AND SPIKES: Switching on and off fluorescent lights and appliances such as refrigerators, washing machines and tumble dryers can cause power surges, which over time can seriously damage electronic equipment

ALL MASTERPLUG SURGE PROTECTOR PRODUCTS HAVE A SAFETY THERMAL CUT-OUT INDICATOR: Letting you know that your connected appliances and electrical equipment is protected. Do not use if the ‘surge production operational indicator’ is not illuminated
THE EIGHT SOCKET EXTENSION LEAD HAS A 13 AMP FUSE WITH SAFETY SHUTTERED SOCKETS: Eliminating the problem when the number of electrical items outnumber the amount of available sockets

USE EFFICIENTLY AROUND THE HOME WITH WALL FIXING CAPABILITY: Giving you the option to mount the 2-metre extension lead, measuring 27 x 10 cm onto the wall, if you are struggling with available ground space
COMES WITH A £1000 CONNECTED EQUIPMENT THREE YEAR WARRANTY: Giving you peace of mind and to show the confidence and belief in the ‘state of the art’ technology in the rectangle extension lead
description: From the manufacturer Masterplug Eight Socket Extension Lead Surge Protected, 2 Metres, White Surge protected extension leads - protects your valuable equipment from damaging surges and spikes Surge protected extension leads that are designed to protect your electrical appliances from power surges and spikes. This eight-gang extension lead from Masterplug at Luceco also has a safety thermal cut-out indicator and comes in a space efficient rectangle design and allows you to plug in multiple electrical devices. More Information 27 x 10 cm (10.5 x 4 inches) 13 Amp 2-Metre cable 1.0 mm cable Features Power surges and spikes Power surges can occur when switching on and off fluorescent lights and appliances such as refrigerators, washing machines and tumble dryers. Over time, this can seriously damage electronic equipment. The eight-socket extension lead protects your electrical appliances from power surges and spikes. Safety thermal cut-out indicator All Masterplug surge protector products have this, letting you know that your connected appliances and electrical equipment are protected. Do not use if the ‘surge production operational indicator’ is not illuminated. Space efficient If you’re struggling for ground space, the extension lead has wall fixing capability along the back, making it space efficient for the home and office. Safety shuttered sockets With eight safety shuttered sockets, the surge protected extension lead measures 27 x 10 cm and has a 13 Amp fuse. £1000 Connected Equipment Three-Year Protection Each product in the Masterplug Surge Protected range comes with a £1000 connected equipment three-year protection. This lets you know how confident Luceco are with this range, and the belief in the ‘state of the art’ technology. About Masterplug With over 75 years experience, the Luceco plc brands of Luceco LED lighting, BG Electrical, Masterplug and Ross are market leaders in key electrical categories, offering a "one stop shop" for trade and retail accessories. Masterplug is one of the most recognisable brands in the world and has been at the forefront of Portable Power for many decades. With a head office in London and global offices in four continents, Luceco has an impressive portfolio of over 2,500 product lines and are continually evolving product ranges, aligned to market trends. So, whether you’re looking for the best in LED lighting, top of the range extension leads, stylish socket covers or dimmer switches, Luceco is the brand that you can trust to deliver on quality production and performance.
